posts.author: cosmiq (Sean Scales)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

It would be extremely useful if an automation could be created based off a number in the numbers column.

For example, if Cell has a number higher than 8, change the status to “call client now”, etc.

Adding the numbers column to automations would help a lot.

Thanks!
